name: place_partpins
short_description: Automatically place a set of partition pins in ooc mode
full_help:
place_partpins

Description: 
Automatically place a set of partition pins in ooc mode

Syntax: 
place_partpins  [-num_locs_per_tile <arg>] [-start_tile <arg>]
                [-end_tile <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<ports>...]

Usage: 
  Name                  Description
  ---------------------------------
  [-num_locs_per_tile]  Number of locs per tile
                        Default: 5
  [-start_tile]         Lower Left Int tile
  [-end_tile]           Upper Right Int tile
  [-quiet]              Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]            Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<ports>]             Ports to place (if omitted, all ports will be placed)

Categories: 
PinPlanning

arguments.description: Number of locs per tile Default: 5
Suspend message limits during command execution
